title: Automation
excerpt: requesting for a feature  to be able to start an automation from a countries phone number .

posts.author: shushe (Maincroft)
posts.cookedHtml: requesting for a feature to be able to start an automation from a countries phone number .

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! Shannon here with the monday team. Could you please share a little more about your use case with me? I’m not quite sure I understand your request. When you say “a countries phone number,” are you referring to the country code in a phone number? For example, if X country code is entered in a Phone Column, you are looking to trigger an automation?
